subject: docs(claude): add Download as PDF suggested implementation
body:
Adds a zero-dependency PDF download pattern using window.print() to the
suggested implementations section. Documents the three-piece approach:
trigger button, no-print utility class, and print-friendly CSS overrides.

Tags: documentation, suggested-implementation, pdf
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
